articles.title: Tongfeng Electronics Announces Major Production Capacity Expansion
articles.summary: Tongfeng Electronics invests $50 million to expand film capacitor production capacity by 40% to meet growing demand from new energy and industrial markets
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics (Anhui Tongfeng Electronics Co., Ltd.) has announced a major capacity expansion project to meet the rapidly growing demand for film capacitors in new energy and industrial automation applications. The $50 million investment will increase the company's annual production capacity by 40%, adding approximately 45 million AC motor capacitors and 8,000 tons of metallized films.

The expansion includes new manufacturing facilities equipped with state-of-the-art winding, metallization, and testing equipment. Advanced automation systems will improve production efficiency and quality consistency. The project is expected to be completed by Q2 2025.

This expansion responds to strong market demand driven by the global energy transition, electric vehicle adoption, and industrial automation trends. Tongfeng's vertically integrated production from polypropylene films to finished capacitors positions the company to support customers with reliable supply and competitive pricing.

articles.title: Tongfeng Receives AEC-Q200 Certification for Automotive Capacitor Series
articles.summary: TF-DC series DC-link capacitors achieve AEC-Q200 qualification, meeting stringent automotive reliability requirements for EV and HEV applications
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics has successfully completed AEC-Q200 qualification for its TF-DC series DC-link capacitors, demonstrating compliance with the automotive industry's stringent reliability standards. The qualification covers capacitors with voltage ratings from 800V to 1500V DC, specifically designed for electric vehicle onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, and traction inverter applications.

The AEC-Q200 qualification process included extensive testing: 1000 temperature cycles (-40°C to +105°C), mechanical shock and vibration testing, moisture resistance testing, and high-temperature operational life testing. All tested parameters met or exceeded the requirements specified in the AEC-Q200 Rev. E standard.

This qualification enables Tongfeng to supply capacitors for automotive OEM and Tier 1 applications, supporting the growing electric vehicle market with cost-effective, high-reliability components. The company is working with several automotive manufacturers on design-in opportunities for next-generation EV platforms.

articles.title: Tongfeng Capacitors Power 1GW Solar Installation Achievement
articles.summary: Tongfeng DC-link capacitors reach milestone with over 1 gigawatt of cumulative solar inverter installations worldwide
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics has achieved a significant milestone with its DC-link capacitors now powering over 1 gigawatt of cumulative solar photovoltaic installations worldwide. This achievement demonstrates the reliability and performance of Tongfeng capacitors in demanding renewable energy applications.

The company's TF-DC series capacitors are deployed in solar inverters ranging from residential 5kW systems to utility-scale 250kW+ central inverters. Field performance data shows zero capacitor failures in over 3 years of operation across various climate conditions including desert, tropical, and temperate environments.

Key factors contributing to this success include the capacitors' high ripple current capability, long operational life (100,000+ hours rated), and robust environmental protection. The metallized film technology with self-healing properties ensures continued operation even after minor dielectric stresses.

Tongfeng continues to work with leading solar inverter manufacturers to develop next-generation capacitors for 1500V DC bus systems and higher power density requirements.

articles.title: Tongfeng and BeiLuo Launch Technical Seminar Series for Design Engineers
articles.summary: Comprehensive technical training program covers film capacitor selection, application design, and reliability engineering for industrial and automotive applications
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics, in partnership with authorized distributor BeiLuo Electronics, has launched a comprehensive technical seminar series for design engineers. The program covers critical aspects of film capacitor application including selection guidelines, sizing calculations, thermal management, and reliability prediction.

The seminar series includes both online webinars and in-person workshops at key locations. Topics covered include: AC motor capacitor selection for appliance and industrial applications, DC-link capacitor design for inverters and drives, metallized film technology and manufacturing, reliability engineering and lifetime prediction, and automotive capacitor requirements (AEC-Q200).

Engineers attending the seminars receive: Detailed application notes and design guides, Access to capacitor sizing calculators and tools, Sample kits for evaluation, Direct access to Tongfeng and BeiLuo FAE team for technical consultation.

The program has already trained over 500 engineers across Asia, Europe, and North America. Registration for upcoming sessions is available through BeiLuo Electronics.

articles.title: Tongfeng Receives Multiple Quality Excellence Awards from Major Customers
articles.summary: Recognized for outstanding quality performance and supply reliability by leading HVAC and industrial drive manufacturers
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics has been recognized with multiple quality excellence awards from major customers in 2023, acknowledging the company's outstanding quality performance and supply reliability. Award recipients include leading HVAC manufacturers, industrial drive companies, and appliance makers.

The awards recognize: Zero PPM (parts per million) defect rates over 12-month periods, On-time delivery performance exceeding 99%, Technical support and responsiveness, Continuous quality improvement initiatives.

These recognitions reflect Tongfeng's commitment to quality through: Comprehensive statistical process control in manufacturing, 100% electrical testing of finished capacitors, Advanced quality management systems (ISO 9001, IATF 16949), Continuous investment in testing and inspection equipment.

The company maintains quality as a core value, understanding that capacitor reliability is critical to customer product performance and brand reputation. These awards strengthen partnerships with key customers and demonstrate Tongfeng's capability to meet the highest quality standards.

articles.title: Tongfeng Introduces Enhanced High-Temperature DC-Link Capacitor Series
articles.summary: New TF-DC-HT series extends operating temperature to 125°C for demanding automotive and industrial applications
articles.content:
Tongfeng Electronics has launched the TF-DC-HT series, an enhanced line of DC-link capacitors designed for high-temperature applications. The new series extends the maximum operating temperature to 125°C, addressing the demanding thermal requirements of automotive under-hood applications and industrial equipment in hot climates.

Key features of the TF-DC-HT series include: Extended temperature range: -40°C to +125°C, High ripple current capability maintained at elevated temperatures, Enhanced thermal management through optimized case design, AEC-Q200 qualification for automotive applications, Voltage ratings from 600V to 1200V DC, Capacitance range from 100µF to 1000µF.

The series targets applications such as: Electric vehicle onboard chargers and DC-DC converters, Automotive electric power steering and HVAC systems, Industrial motor drives in high-temperature environments, Solar inverters in desert installations.

Engineering samples are available now, with production quantities available from Q1 2024. Contact BeiLuo Electronics for samples and technical documentation.
